description: Paraphrase Test Set: 15 question families, 3 variants each (45 total)
purpose: Tests semantic answer equivalence across different phrasings of the same underlying question. If the system gives inconsistent answers to paraphrases, it suggests retrieval fragility or memorization of specific phrasings.

evaluation_criteria.semantic_equivalence: All variants in a family must produce semantically equivalent answers
evaluation_criteria.retrieval_stability: Same articles should be retrieved for all variants

test_cases.canonical_question: What is the exact term of this collective bargaining agreement?

variants.question: What is the exact term of this collective bargaining agreement?
When does this union contract start and end?
How long is the current CBA effective for, and what are the start and expiration dates?

test_cases.canonical_question: What is the starting hourly rate for an All Purpose Clerk as of January 21, 2024?

variants.question: What is the starting hourly rate for an All Purpose Clerk as of January 21, 2024?
How much does a new All Purpose Clerk make per hour starting 1/21/2024?
I just got hired as an All Purpose Clerk. What's my pay rate gonna be? Today is January 21, 2024.

test_cases.canonical_question: How many hours constitute the probationary period for new employees?

variants.question: How many hours constitute the probationary period for new employees?
How long is the probation period for a new hire?
I'm new, when am I done with my trial period? Is it based on hours or days?

test_cases.canonical_question: What is the Sunday premium pay rate for employees hired before March 27, 2005?

variants.question: What is the Sunday premium pay rate for employees hired before March 27, 2005?
Do I get extra pay for working Sundays if I was hired in 2003?
What Sunday premium applies to grandfathered employees hired prior to 3/27/2005?

test_cases.canonical_question: Calculate the severance pay for a full-time employee with 7 years and 4 months of continuous service whose store closes.

variants.question: Calculate the severance pay for a full-time employee with 7 years and 4 months of continuous service whose store closes.
My store is shutting down. I've worked here full-time for about 7 years and 4 months. How much severance do I get?
Under the store closure severance provisions, what would a full-time employee with 7 years 4 months seniority receive?

test_cases.canonical_question: An employee works 9 hours on Monday, 8 hours Tuesday-Thursday, and 6 hours on Friday. How many overtime hours are owed?

variants.question: An employee works 9 hours on Monday, 8 hours Tuesday-Thursday, and 6 hours on Friday. How many overtime hours are owed?
I worked 9 hrs Monday, 8 each from Tuesday to Thursday, and 6 on Friday. Do I get any OT?
For a weekly schedule of Mon=9h, Tue-Thu=8h each, Fri=6h, what is the total overtime liability per Article 12?

test_cases.canonical_question: An employee hired in 2010 is laid off. How long do they retain recall rights?

variants.question: An employee hired in 2010 is laid off. How long do they retain recall rights?
I got laid off and I've been working here since 2010. How long can they call me back?
What is the duration of recall rights for a laid-off employee with hire date in 2010?

test_cases.canonical_question: How many personal holidays are employees hired after March 27, 2005 entitled to after four years of service?

variants.question: How many personal holidays are employees hired after March 27, 2005 entitled to after four years of service?
I was hired in 2010 and I've been here 4 years now. How many floater days do I get?
Personal holiday entitlement after 4 years for post-March 2005 hires?

test_cases.canonical_question: An employee requests bereavement leave for their spouse's grandmother's funeral. How many paid days are they entitled to?

variants.question: An employee requests bereavement leave for their spouse's grandmother's funeral. How many paid days are they entitled to?
My wife's grandma died. How many days off with pay can I get for the funeral?
Under bereavement leave provisions, what is the paid leave entitlement for the death of an in-law grandparent?

test_cases.canonical_question: A 'specially trained' Cake Decorator is subject to layoff. Another employee with more seniority has only 4 months experience as a Cake Decorator. Can they displace the Cake Decorator?

variants.question: A 'specially trained' Cake Decorator is subject to layoff. Another employee with more seniority has only 4 months experience as a Cake Decorator. Can they displace the Cake Decorator?
I'm a cake decorator about to get laid off. Can someone with more seniority but only 4 months decorating experience bump me?
Under layoff bumping provisions, can a senior employee with fewer than 6 months of Cake Decorator experience within the past 3 years displace a specially-trained Cake Decorator?

test_cases.canonical_question: An employee is enrolled in Plan B health coverage. Their spouse becomes eligible for coverage through their own employer. What fee applies?

variants.question: An employee is enrolled in Plan B health coverage. Their spouse becomes eligible for coverage through their own employer. What fee applies?
My husband just got a job with health insurance. I have Plan B through the union. Do we have to pay extra now?
What is the spousal surcharge or working spouse fee under Plan B when a dependent spouse has access to other employer-sponsored coverage?

test_cases.canonical_question: What is the night premium for employees?

variants.question: What is the night premium for employees?
Do I get extra money for working the graveyard shift?
What is the hourly differential for night shift work per Article 15?

test_cases.canonical_question: What happens if an employee refuses a lie detector test?

variants.question: What happens if an employee refuses a lie detector test?
Can my boss fire me if I say no to a polygraph?
Under Article 51, what protections exist for employees who decline to submit to a lie detector examination?

test_cases.canonical_question: What is the grievance filing deadline for a discharge?

variants.question: What is the grievance filing deadline for a discharge?
I got fired. How long do I have to file a grievance?
What is the time limit to initiate the grievance procedure following a termination under Article 46?

test_cases.canonical_question: What is the minimum rest period between shifts?

variants.question: What is the minimum rest period between shifts?
My boss scheduled me to close at 11pm and open at 5am the next day. Is that allowed?
What are the contractual requirements for minimum hours between the end of one shift and the start of the next?
